title: Badges for Radical Cobblemon Trainers (Compatibility Pack)
description: Cobblemon Pokémon Badges + Radical Cobblemon Trainer
body:
### [Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) is **required** for this Data Pack. 
This datpack makes [Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) work with [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod).

Should be compatible with **Fabric** and **Neo Forge**.
